question: I have draft Stellar copy with project names, handles, and factual claims. What workflow should audit and enrich it before publication?

golden.answer: Use Stellar Content Auditor. Resolve named projects to canonical directory records, validate handles and names, search indexed content for support, preserve source URLs, separate supported facts from unsupported claims, and return an audit report with corrections and citation-ready enrichment. Treat summaries as leads and verify consequential specifics at their sources.
keyFacts: Resolves canonical project names and handles before editing the draft.
Separates supported claims from unsupported ones and preserves source URLs.
avoid: Do NOT silently replace an uncertain handle with a guessed one.
Do NOT turn an indexed summary into an unattributed primary-source claim.
golden.notes: Best-source case for the bundled Stellar Content Auditor skill.

sources.note: Fetch-verified local path exists and defines the exercised contract/workflow.
